titleStmt.title: SII 20.85: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 85. (B.K. No. 35 of 1937-38.) HIRĒ-BĒVINŪR, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in Siddharāmēśvara Temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 49, Krōdhi, Chaitra ba. 5, Thursday, corresponding to 1124 A.D., April 5, the weekday being Saturday and not Thursday.

The inscription records a gift of land, money, etc., to Dēvaśakti-paṇḍita on the occasion of the consecration of the image of Bhōgēśvaradēva at Hiriya-Bēvinūr by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Ḍākarasa of Tarddavāḍi belonging to the Siḷāhāra family. It also registers other gifts of taxes to the same temple by the Seṭṭis, Mummuridaṇḍas, and Ubhaya-nānādēśis of the 36 villages and also by the Five Hundred of the place. The king is stated to have been ruling from Jayantīpura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī svasti śrījayāścābhyudayaśca namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmara
cāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti samasta
bhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara pa
ramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmattribhuva
namalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamā
candrārkkatāraṁbara saltamire jayaṁtīpurada nelavīḍinoḷu su
khasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire . himasaiḷēṁdradinitta sētu
varegaṁ pūrvvadriyiṁdattalastamahēṁdraṁbaraṁ samaṁtu nelanaṁ niḥkaṁṭakaṁ mā
ḍi vikramadiṁ visvanarēsvaraprabhuteyaṁ tāḷdirdda cāḷukya cakri mahōtsāhadinā
ḷdaneyde dhareyaṁ permmāḍibhūvallabha . © . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahā
śabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara kopaṇapuravarādhīśvara jīmūtavāhanānvaya
prasūta sauryaraghujāta svavarnnagaruḍadhvaja sahajamakaradhvaja śiḷā
hārakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa samarapracaṁḍa karbbeṭṭakāḷāṁjarapuraparamē
śvara kadanamahēśvara viśamahayārūḍharēvaṁta ripubaḷakritāṁta śrīma
ccāmuṁḍikādēvīlabdhavaraprasāda tyāgavinōda maṁneya vallabha bhayalōbhadurlla
bha munivarāditya sanivārasiddi kuśadhārāgrabuddhi Ariripumadanivāraṇa nāmā
disamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara tarddavāḍiya piriya
gōvaṇarasaṁ ḍākarasa kiriya gōvaṇarasa dharmapratipāḷakaniṁdarasana maga
Āhumallarasa Ātanagraja ḍākarasaru pratiṣṭākāladalu bhūmiyaṁ sarvva
namasyamāgi biṭṭaru . svasti śrīmatu cāḷukya vikramavarṣada 49 ttane
ya krōdhi saṁvatsarada caitra bahuḷa paṁcami brihaspativāradaṁdu hi
riya bēvinūra rēvikavvegavuḍiya puramaṭhada bhōgēsvaradēvargge . © . svasti yama
niyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa mōnāanuṣṭāṇajasamādhisīlasaṁpaṁnara
ppa dēvaśaktipaṇḍitarggaṁ dēvargge pratiṣṭākāladalu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ
dharmmanimittamāgi biṭṭa keyi vūriṁ paḍuvalu masigeyiṁ teṁkalu laḷa
Iṁ teṁkalu māṇikēsvarada kōla mattaru Ayivatu Ā keyoḷage
pūjārige māṇikēsvarada kōla mattaru Ayidu karuvavaḷḷadiṁ baḍagalu mū
ṟu tōṭake māṇikēsvarada kōla mattaru mūṟu dēvariṁ baḍagalupparadakēriyali gā
ṇaveraḍu nandādīvigege Alliya maṭada catrakeṁdu sallageyuma yiṁtinitumaṁ sarvvana
masyamāgi biṭṭaru . pannegavāḍadā pūjege biṭṭa dharmmamaṁ mannisi kāvuda
satrakāṇike sēseyāsegaḷu manneyavāyadāya mānya sallavu
sarvanamasyameṁdu biṭṭaṁ negaḷdaṁ ḍākamaṇḍaḷikanaccari tannaya vaṁsamuḷḷinaṁ . A
vagāḷva keyoḷaṁ maneyoḷaṁ pūdōṁṭadoḷu gāṇadoḷu prabhu nneya
rārādoḍa nāḍarasara bhayaṁgeḍade koṭṭaruvaṇagoṁṇḍara svāna
gārddhapa namage piṁgadevasuṁ janmāṁtararaurava . parirakṣisadī dharmadoḷarasara
kāṇike koḷḷiyaruvaṇa kiṟusuṁka ḍamaṁ baṇnigeyaṁ daravīsamanaḷipikoṇḍavaṁ cā
ṇḍāḷaṁ . Idanīyaṁdadoḷeyde pāḷisidavarggiṣṭārtthasaṁsiddhi saṁbhavikuṁ pūṇḍaḷidaṁge gaṁ
ge gaye kurukṣētrameṁbivaṟoḷu hēsade pārvvaraṁ kavileyaṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ liṁgi
yappavaraṁ kondana vaṁsa gōtrasi(sa)hita bīḷguṁ mahāghōradoḷu . sāmānyō yaṁ dharmmasē
tu nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāḷanīyō bhavadubhiḥ sarvvānētānu bhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrā bhūyō
bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādibhi yasya yasya
yadā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharā śaṣṭirva
rśśasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . khaṇḍasphuṭitajīrṇnōddhārakke Iṭṭage
ya dāsōjaṁge māṇikēśvarada kōla mattaru hattu Aydu kaiya maneyinti nisuvaṁ sa
dharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvaru . ya nivēsaṇa
damaged
svasti śrīmatu mūvattāṟuṁ bīḍina seṭṭiyaruṁ muṁmuridaṁḍa vubhayanānādēsi sthaḷadainūrvvaruṁThis and the
pramukhyavāgi biṭṭaru koṁge koṭṭalli māna 1 koṁḍalli māna 1 vurali huṭṭida mudrapa hoṁge hāga 2 ḍu bē
ḷeyavaḷavali mattā gavaṟegātrigaruṁ biṭṭaru hēṟigeyvattele hoṁge hattaḍake prati pālsu
varu .
Digital edition of SII 20.85 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
